name: focusflow
description: Team productivity SaaS — Kanban boards with real-time collaboration, AI assistance, and Stripe billing

scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/web && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/ai-worker
scripts.test: npm test -w apps/web && npm test -w apps/api && npm test -w apps/ai-worker
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/web && npm run lint -w apps/api && npm run lint -w apps/ai-worker
